001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
034
035/**
036 * Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * Produces strict JSON with double-quoted strings by default. For JSON5-style output (single quotes,
040 * etc.), use {@link Json5Serializer}.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
043 * <p>
044 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>application/json, text/json</bc>
045 * <p>
046 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>application/json</bc>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
049 * <p>
050 * The conversion is as follows...
051 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
052 *    <li>
053 *       Maps (e.g. {@link HashMap HashMaps}, {@link TreeMap TreeMaps}) are converted to JSON objects.
054 *    <li>
055 *       Collections (e.g. {@link HashSet HashSets}, {@link LinkedList LinkedLists}) and Java arrays are converted to
056 *       JSON arrays.
057 *    <li>
058 *       {@link String Strings} are converted to JSON strings.
059 *    <li>
060 *       {@link Number Numbers} (e.g. {@link Integer}, {@link Long}, {@link Double}) are converted to JSON numbers.
061 *    <li>
062 *       {@link Boolean Booleans} are converted to JSON booleans.
063 *    <li>
064 *       {@code nulls} are converted to JSON nulls.
065 *    <li>
066 *       {@code arrays} are converted to JSON arrays.
067 *    <li>
068 *       {@code beans} are converted to JSON objects.
069 * </ul>
070 *
071 * <p>
072 * The types above are considered "JSON-primitive" object types.
073 * Any non-JSON-primitive object types are transformed into JSON-primitive object types through
074 * {@link ObjectSwap ObjectSwaps} associated through the
075 * {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#swaps(Class...)} method.
076 * Several default transforms are provided for transforming Dates, Enums, Iterators, etc...
077 *
078 * <p>
079 * This serializer provides several serialization options.
080 * Typically, one of the predefined DEFAULT serializers will be sufficient.
081 * However, custom serializers can be constructed to fine-tune behavior.
082 *
083 * <h5 class='topic'>Behavior-specific subclasses</h5>
084 * <p>
085 * The following direct subclasses are provided for convenience:
086 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
087 *    <li>
088 *       {@link Json5Serializer} - Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
089 *    <li>
090 *       {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.Json5Serializer.Readable} - Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
091 * </ul>
092 *
093 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
094 * <p class='bjava'>
095 *    <jc>// Use one of the default serializers to serialize a POJO</jc>
096 *    String <jv>json</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>someObject</jv>);
097 *
098 *    <jc>// Create a custom serializer for lax syntax using single quote characters</jc>
099 *    JsonSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().simple().sq().build();
100 *
101 *    <jc>// Clone an existing serializer and modify it to use single-quotes</jc>
102 *    <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.copy().sq().build();
103 *
104 *    <jc>// Serialize a POJO to JSON</jc>
105 *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>someObject</jv>);
106 * </p>
107 *
108 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (Map of name/age):</h5>
109 * <p class='bjson'>
110 *    {<js>"name"</js>:<js>"Alice"</js>,<js>"age"</js>:30}
111 * </p>
112 *
113 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested object + array):</h5>
114 * <p class='bjson'>
115 *    {<js>"name"</js>:<js>"Alice"</js>,<js>"age"</js>:30,<js>"address"</js>:{<js>"street"</js>:<js>"123 Main St"</js>,<js>"city"</js>:<js>"Boston"</js>,<js>"state"</js>:<js>"MA"</js>},<js>"tags"</js>:[<js>"a"</js>,<js>"b"</js>,<js>"c"</js>]}
116 * </p>
117 *
118 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
119 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
120 * </ul>
121 *
122 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
123 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JsonBasics">JSON Basics</a>
124 *    <li class='link'>{@link Json5Serializer} - For JSON5-style output (single quotes, etc.)
125 * </ul>
126 */
127@SuppressWarnings({
128   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
129   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
130   "resource"   // serializeTokens(...) returns a Closeable owned by the caller; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
131})
132public class JsonSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements JsonMetaProvider, TokenWritable, ArrayRecordWritable {
133
134   // Property name constants
135   private static final String PROP_addBeanTypesJson = "addBeanTypesJson";
136   private static final String PROP_escapeSolidus = "escapeSolidus";
137
138   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
139   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
140
141   /**
142    * Builder class.
143    */
144   @SuppressWarnings({
145      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
146   })
147   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
148
149      private static final Cache<HashKey,JsonSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, JsonSerializer.class).build();
150
151      private boolean addBeanTypesJson;
152      private boolean escapeSolidus;
153
154      /**
155       * Constructor, default settings.
156       */
157      protected Builder() {
158         produces("application/json");
159         accept("application/json,text/json");
160         addBeanTypesJson = env("JsonSerializer.addBeanTypes", false);
161         escapeSolidus = env("JsonSerializer.escapeSolidus", false);
162      }
163
164      /**
165       * Copy constructor.
166       *
167       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
168       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
169       */
170      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
171         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
172         addBeanTypesJson = copyFrom.addBeanTypesJson;
173         escapeSolidus = copyFrom.escapeSolidus;
174      }
175
176      /**
177       * Copy constructor.
178       *
179       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
180       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
181       */
182      protected Builder(JsonSerializer copyFrom) {
183         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
184         addBeanTypesJson = copyFrom.addBeanTypesJson;
185         escapeSolidus = copyFrom.escapeSolidus;
186      }
187
188      /**
189       * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
190       *
191       * <p>
192       * If <jk>true</jk>, then <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
193       * through reflection.
194       *
195       * <p>
196       * When present, this value overrides the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()} setting and is
197       * provided to customize the behavior of specific serializers in a {@link SerializerSet}.
198       *
199       * <p>
200       * <b>Token streams:</b> the cursor's raw structural methods do not emit <c>"_type"</c>;
201       * however this setting IS honored by
202       * {@link TokenWriter#object(Object) TokenWriter.object(Object)}
203       * when walking a bean.
204       *
205       * @return This object.
206       */
207      public SELF addBeanTypesJson() {
208         return addBeanTypesJson(true);
209      }
210
211      /**
212       * Same as {@link #addBeanTypesJson()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
213       *
214       * @param value The value for this setting.
215       * @return This object.
216       */
217      public SELF addBeanTypesJson(boolean value) {
218         addBeanTypesJson = value;
219         return self();
220      }
221
222      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
223      public JsonSerializer build() {
224         return cache(CACHE).build(JsonSerializer.class);
225      }
226
227      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
228      public abstract SELF copy();
229
230      /**
231       * Prefix solidus <js>'/'</js> characters with escapes.
232       *
233       * <p>
234       * If enabled, solidus (e.g. slash) characters should be escaped.
235       *
236       * <p>
237       * The JSON specification allows for either format.
238       * <br>However, if you're embedding JSON in an HTML script tag, this setting prevents confusion when trying to serialize
239       * <xt>&lt;\/script&gt;</xt>.
240       *
241       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
242       * <p class='bjava'>
243       *    <jc>// Create a JSON serializer that escapes solidus characters.</jc>
244       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
245       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
246       *       .simple()
247       *       .escapeSolidus()
248       *       .build();
249       *
250       *    <jc>// Produces: "{foo:'&lt;\/bar&gt;'"</jc>
251       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(JsonMap.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"foo"</js>, <js>"&lt;/bar&gt;"</js>);
252       * </p>
253       *
254       * @return This object.
255       */
256      public SELF escapeSolidus() {
257         return escapeSolidus(true);
258      }
259
260      /**
261       * Same as {@link #escapeSolidus()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
262       *
263       * @param value The value for this setting.
264       * @return This object.
265       */
266      public SELF escapeSolidus(boolean value) {
267         escapeSolidus = value;
268         return self();
269      }
270
271      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
272      public HashKey hashKey() {
273         // @formatter:off
274         return HashKey.of(
275            super.hashKey(),
276            addBeanTypesJson,
277            escapeSolidus
278         );
279         // @formatter:on
280      }
281
282
283   }
284
285   /**
286    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link JsonSerializer#create()} / {@link JsonSerializer#copy()} path.
287    */
288   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
289
290      DefaultBuilder() {}
291
292      DefaultBuilder(JsonSerializer copyFrom) {
293         super(copyFrom);
294      }
295
296      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
297         super(copyFrom);
298      }
299
300      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
301      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
302         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
303      }
304   }
305
306   /** Default serializer, with whitespace. */
307   public static class Readable extends JsonSerializer {
308
309      /**
310       * Constructor.
311       *
312       * @param builder The builder for this object.
313       */
314      public Readable(Builder<?> builder) {
315         super(builder.useWhitespace());
316      }
317   }
318
319   /** Default serializer, all default settings.*/
320   public static final JsonSerializer DEFAULT = new JsonSerializer(create());
321
322   /** Default serializer, all default settings.*/
323   public static final JsonSerializer DEFAULT_READABLE = new Readable(create());
324
325   /**
326    * Creates a new builder for this object.
327    *
328    * @return A new builder.
329    */
330   @SuppressWarnings({
331      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
332   })
333   public static Builder<?> create() {
334      return new DefaultBuilder();
335   }
336
337   protected final boolean addBeanTypesJson;
338   protected final boolean escapeSolidus;
339
340   private final boolean addBeanTypes2;
341   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,JsonBeanPropertyMeta> jsonBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
342   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,JsonClassMeta> jsonClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
343
344   private final AtomicReference<JsonSchemaSerializer> schemaSerializer = new AtomicReference<>();
345
346   /**
347    * Constructor.
348    *
349    * @param builder The builder for this object.
350    */
351   public JsonSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
352      super(builder);
353      addBeanTypesJson = builder.addBeanTypesJson;
354      escapeSolidus = builder.escapeSolidus;
355
356      addBeanTypes2 = addBeanTypesJson || super.isAddBeanTypes();
357   }
358
359   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
360   public Builder<?> copy() {
361      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
362   }
363
364   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
365   public JsonSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
366      return JsonSerializerSession.create(this);
367   }
368
369   @Override /* Overridden from JsonMetaProvider */
370   public JsonBeanPropertyMeta getJsonBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
371      if (bpm == null)
372         return JsonBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
373      return jsonBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new JsonBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
374   }
375
376   @Override /* Overridden from JsonMetaProvider */
377   public JsonClassMeta getJsonClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
378      return jsonClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new JsonClassMeta(k, this));
379   }
380
381   /**
382    * Returns the schema serializer based on the settings of this serializer.
383    *
384    * <p>
385    * Note that this method creates a builder initialized to all default settings, whereas {@link #copy()} copies
386    * the settings of the object called on.
387    *
388    * @return The schema serializer.
389    */
390   public JsonSchemaSerializer getSchemaSerializer() {
391      JsonSchemaSerializer result = schemaSerializer.get();
392      if (result == null) {
393         result = JsonSchemaSerializer.create().marshallingContext(getMarshallingContext()).build();
394         if (! schemaSerializer.compareAndSet(null, result)) {
395            result = schemaSerializer.get();
396         }
397      }
398      return result;
399   }
400
401   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
402   public JsonSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
403
404   /**
405    * Convenience delegator that opens a {@link JsonTokenWriter} over the output using
406    * <b>default session arguments</b> (mirrors {@link #serialize(Object, Object)}).
407    *
408    * <p>
409    * The real implementation lives on {@link JsonSerializerSession#serializeTokens(Object)}.
410    * Callers that need request-derived configuration should call {@link #createSession()} and
411    * invoke {@link JsonSerializerSession#serializeTokens(Object)} on the built session instead.
412    *
413    * @param output The output.  Accepts {@link Writer}, {@link OutputStream}, {@link File}, or
414    *    {@link StringBuilder}.
415    * @return A new {@link JsonTokenWriter}.
416    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
417    */
418   @Override /* TokenWritable */
419   public TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException {
420      return getSession().serializeTokens(output);
421   }
422
423   /**
424    * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
425    *
426    * @see Builder#addBeanTypesJson()
427    * @return
428    *    <jk>true</jk> if <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
429    *    through reflection.
430    */
431   @Override
432   protected final boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return addBeanTypes2; }
433
434   /**
435    * Prefix solidus <js>'/'</js> characters with escapes.
436    *
437    * @see Builder#escapeSolidus()
438    * @return
439    *    <jk>true</jk> if solidus (e.g. slash) characters should be escaped.
440    */
441   protected final boolean isEscapeSolidus() { return escapeSolidus; }
442
443   @Override /* Overridden from WriterSerializer */
444   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
445      return super.properties()
446         .a(PROP_addBeanTypesJson, addBeanTypesJson)
447         .a(PROP_escapeSolidus, escapeSolidus);
448   }
449
450   /**
451    * Convenience delegator for the streaming array-element {@link RecordWriter} (uses default
452    * session args; see {@link #serializeTokens(Object)}).  Real impl on
453    * {@link JsonSerializerSession#serializeArrayRecords(Object)}.
454    *
455    * @param output The output.
456    * @return A new element-streamed {@link RecordWriter}.
457    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
458    */
459   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
460   public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
461      return getSession().serializeArrayRecords(output);
462   }
463}
